scenario: Married filing jointly with two W-2s ($95k + $55k) and Schedule A itemized deductions exceeding MFJ standard — SALT $14k + mortgage $14.5k + charity $5k
source: IRS VITA Pub 4491 TY2025, illustrative case — Deductions module (Schedule A); IRC §163(h), §164, §170; SALT cap $40,000 per OBBBA §70002
